title: add prognostic edmf single column case

body:
Clean up cache for:
- precipitation
- edmfx_nh_pressure
- subsidence
- EDMFCoriolis
- forcing_type
- non_orographic_gravity_wave
- orographic_gravity_wave
- hyperdiffiusion
- radiation
- limiters

Add surface_setup to AtmosModel and removes dt from simulation

A quick test seem to indicate that this PR reduces compile time by 5-10 % (or more in some cases)
title: Clean more caches

body:
JLD2 is used exclusively for a scaling test in the driver. I moved that function to a `common.jl` file outside of `src` that is imported by the driver.

Removing JLD2 as a direct dependency reduces import time by 10%.
title: Remove JLD2 as direct dependency

body:

	modified:   src/callbacks/callbacks.jl

```
	deleted:    longrun_aquaplanet_rhoe_equil_clearsky_highres_hightop_rayleigh35e3_ft32.yml
```
Update ref counter
Closes #2300
title: Callbacks - remove F64 conversion (insolation) and remove unused config
